title: Duluth Trading Company
html:
Stub. Duluth Trading Company — American workwear retailer known for over-the-top working-man visual gags in TV commercials (Ballroom jeans, Buck Naked underwear, beard-and-flannel everyman). Used by Yahir as a friend-typology shorthand to describe Riley's look.

First mentioned in 2022 11 28 riley looks like a character from a duluth trading commercia.

related.label: Riley looks like a character from a Duluth Trading commercial
